subject: Re: LSJ Remote light controls
body:
no.. ask emad for a different remote.,.I don't like the one in the gym


----- Original Message ----
From: "Miles Alexander, LSJ" <littlestjames@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffery E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; Daphne Wallace <daphnew@ftcvi.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 5, 2006 1:41:23 PM
Subject: LSJ Remote light controls


Greetings
 
The attached images represent the proposed remote control system we would like to install to control the lights above the dining room and magazine table areas. The system is the same as the one used in the gym. I think I can paint the cover plate to represent the wood.
 
Please advise if I can go ahead and install.
 
Thanks 
 
Miles
